scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d postgres redis coturn
scripts.dev:all: pnpm dev:setup && pnpm dev:infra && pnpm dev
scripts.smoke:all: pnpm smoke:http && pnpm smoke:ws && pnpm smoke:ws:negative
scripts.load:k6:signaling:quick: K6_STAGE_1=5s K6_STAGE_2=5s K6_STAGE_3=2s K6_VUS_1=5 K6_VUS_2=10 pnpm load:k6:signaling
scripts.load:k6:signaling:quick:summary: mkdir -p artifacts/k6 && K6_STAGE_1=5s K6_STAGE_2=5s K6_STAGE_3=2s K6_VUS_1=5 K6_VUS_2=10 k6 run --summary-export=artifacts/k6/signaling-quick-summary.json scripts/load/signaling-k6.js
scripts.load:k6:signaling:stress: K6_STAGE_1=8s K6_STAGE_2=10s K6_STAGE_3=4s K6_VUS_1=30 K6_VUS_2=60 K6_SIGNALING_CONNECT_P95_MS=200 K6_SIGNALING_SESSION_P95_MS=1200 pnpm load:k6:signaling
scripts.load:k6:signaling:stress:summary: mkdir -p artifacts/k6 && K6_STAGE_1=8s K6_STAGE_2=10s K6_STAGE_3=4s K6_VUS_1=30 K6_VUS_2=60 K6_SIGNALING_CONNECT_P95_MS=200 K6_SIGNALING_SESSION_P95_MS=1200 k6 run --summary-export=artifacts/k6/signaling-stress-summary.json scripts/load/signaling-k6.js
